title: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly
abstract: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly is an AI tool that solves a specific problem well. Whether it is boosting productivity or enabling something new, it is worth a look. HN discussi...
abstract_zh: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly 是个挺有意思的AI工具，解决的问题很具体。不管是提升效率还是解锁新能力，都值得花几分钟了解一下。
